title: Points At
description: Player-directed in-world arrows with chat messages to point friends to looking at something. Styled after SS13
body:
![Banner for Points At. It's just an image from the gallery and its icon.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78fab4778be3e6e8c43fbbdc27097933aa5eea8e.png)

<center>Points At is a multiplayer-focused utility and somewhat comedic mod to make giving directions to nearby players easier. Rather than simply gesturing the player in animation, it throws a large and much harder to miss arrow to your crosshair target, while announcing said target in chat to players in your line of sight. It's styled after SS13/Space Station 13, up to even including compressing repeats in chat.
  
The default hotkey is [H], and can be changed any time.

You can change the color of arrows you send by simply going into your client configuration and changing the hex code in the lifetime setting. It will update and sync in real-time for everybody on the server!

Available for 1.20.1 Forge/Neoforge, and 1.21.1 Neoforge.

Free to use in any modpack or server that does not have a content paywall.

If you have issues, either add me on Discord (forsetcabiri) or send an email (forsetcabiri@gmail.com).</center>
